title: Blank display names are accepted
description: Whitespace-only profile names pass length validation.
requirement: REQ-VALID-1: A display name must contain 2–80 non-whitespace characters.
seededViolation: The endpoint checks raw string length instead of trimmed content.
whyItMatters: Profiles can have unusable blank identities.

expectedFindings.title: Display name lacks trimmed validation
expectedFindings.description: Whitespace-only names pass the length check.

distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: Rejecting invalid types satisfies the API contract.
